Opcode.name: PCM_OP_BILL_SET_LIMIT_AND_CR
Opcode.Doc: This opcode will set the credit limit for both currency and non-currency resources.

Poid.name: PIN_FLD_POID
Poid.Doc: Account object action was applied to

Poid.name: PIN_FLD_SERVICE_OBJ
Poid.Doc: Service object action was applied to

Poid.name: PIN_FLD_BAL_GRP_OBJ
Poid.Doc: Balance Group poid: if passed, this balance group will be impacted otherwise, the one which belongs to the optional service_obj (if passed) or the account default one will be impacted.

Poid.name: PIN_FLD_SESSION_OBJ
Poid.Doc: Session object - session in which event took place - null means none

String.name: PIN_FLD_DESCR
String.Doc: Event description - free text for application to describe event.

Timestamp.name: PIN_FLD_START_T
Timestamp.Doc: Start time - Timestamp of when event started (Portal Time).

Timestamp.name: PIN_FLD_END_T
Timestamp.Doc: End time - Timestamp of when event ended (Portal Time). This field is used to determine which billing cycle the event is part of.

Int.name: PIN_FLD_FLAGS
Int.Doc: Flags : 0 - Default value, If PIN_FLD_THRESHOLDS not passed,Merge with existing values. 1 - If PIN_FLD_THRESHOLDS not passed, set this to NULL.

Array.name: PIN_FLD_LIMIT
Array.Doc: Limit array. Only one element can appear in this array. Its element-id matches the balance element whose limit is to be set. This field is mandatory if PIN_FLD_RULES not present.

Decimal.name: PIN_FLD_CREDIT_LIMIT
Decimal.Doc: Limit for this resource. Current balance cannot exceed this limit unless affected by a limit override rate or manually adjusted by a CSR.

Decimal.name: PIN_FLD_CREDIT_FLOOR
Decimal.Doc: Baseline for calculating percentage for threshold triggers. Credit limit minus credit floor is 100% of measured range. Credit floor does NOT enforce any limit on current balance.

Int.name: PIN_FLD_DYNAMIC_CREDIT_FLOOR
Int.Doc: Flags to indicate dynamic credit floor setting, whether to use credit_floor or sum of original balances for credit thresholds check

Int.name: PIN_FLD_OVERRIDE_CREDIT_LIMIT
Int.Doc: Flag to determine to either consider or not consider the credit limit. If flag is 0,(which is default), then credit limit will be decided based on rating modes. If the flag is 0x01, then credit limit will be overriden.

Int.name: PIN_FLD_CREDIT_THRESHOLDS
Int.Doc: Bit flags for triggering when resource balance crosses a boundary when increasing in value.

Int.name: PIN_FLD_LOAN_THRESHOLDS
Int.Doc: Bit flags for triggering when resource balance crosses a boundary when increasing in value.

Int.name: PIN_FLD_ROLL_UP_CREDIT_LIMIT
Int.Doc: This flag is used to roll up credit limit in a Payment Responsible Real-Time Credit Enforcement (PR_RTCE) balance monitoring group. If the flag value is 1, then the credit limit of nonpaying child account will be rolled up to its parent account's balance group monitor. Once the child account is moved out of hierarchy, the rolled up credit limit will be rolled down to the corresponding nonpaying child account's balance group.

Timestamp.name: PIN_FLD_VALID_FROM
Timestamp.Doc: Start date of this validity. If unit and offset are also passed PIN_FLD_VALID_FROM takes precedence

Enum.name: PIN_FLD_VALID_FROM_UNIT
Enum.Doc:
Used for calculating validity if PIN_FLD_VALID_FROM is not passed. Relative Unit for validity start date can be
Seconds(1)
Minutes(2)
Hours(3)
Days(4)
Months(5)
Act Cycles(8)

Int.name: PIN_FLD_VALID_FROM_OFFSET
Int.Doc: Used for calculating validity if PIN_FLD_VALID_FROM is not passed. Relative offset for validity to be used in conjunction with unit to calculate start time

Timestamp.name: PIN_FLD_VALID_TO
Timestamp.Doc: End date of this validity. If unit and offset are also passed PIN_FLD_VALID_TO takes precedence

Enum.name: PIN_FLD_VALID_TO_UNIT
Enum.Doc:
Used for calculating validity if PIN_FLD_VALID_TO is not passed. Relative Unit for validity end date can be
Seconds(1)
Minutes(2)
Hours(3)
Days(4)
Months(5)
Act Cycles(8)

Int.name: PIN_FLD_VALID_TO_OFFSET
Int.Doc: Used for calculating validity if PIN_FLD_VALID_TO is not passed. Relative offset for validity to be used in conjunction with unit to calculate end time

Int.name: PIN_FLD_REC_ID
Int.Doc: RecId for the sub-balance to be updated

Array.name: PIN_FLD_RULES
Array.Doc: This array contains the consumption rules to be applied on the resource. This field is mandatory if PIN_FLD_LIMIT is not present.

Enum.name: PIN_FLD_CONSUMPTION_RULE
Enum.Doc: Consumption rule to be applied on the resource for determining the sub-balance to consume.

Values.Doc: Earliest start time and latest expiration time
Earliest start time and earliest expiration time
Latest start time and earliest expiration time
Latest start time and latest expiration time
Earliest expiration time and earliest start time
Earliest expiration time and latest start time
Latest expiration time and earliest start time
Latest expiration time and latest start time

Substruct.name: PIN_FLD_CONTEXT_INFO
Substruct.Doc: Substruct to pass information from external clients.

String.name: PIN_FLD_CORRELATION_ID
String.Doc: Correlation id passed by an external system to BRM.

String.name: PIN_FLD_EXTERNAL_USER
String.Doc: User of an external system connecting to BRM.

Array.name: PIN_FLD_RESULTS
Array.Doc: Array of results information. Since only one event object is created by this call, only one element will be returned. The element-id is not significant.

Poid.name: PIN_FLD_POID
Poid.Doc: Poid of the event object created for event

Poid.name: PIN_FLD_SERVICE_OBJ
Poid.Doc: Service object action was applied to

Enum.name: PIN_FLD_RATING_STATUS
Enum.Doc: Status of Rating result. Either success or reason for failure

Array.name: PIN_FLD_LIMIT
Array.Doc: Limit array. Only one element can appear in this array. Its element-id matches the balance element whose limit is to be set.

Decimal.name: PIN_FLD_CREDIT_LIMIT
Decimal.Doc: Limit for this resource. Current balance cannot exceed this limit unless affected by a limit override rate or manually adjusted by a CSR.

Decimal.name: PIN_FLD_CREDIT_FLOOR
Decimal.Doc: Baseline for calculating percentage for threshold triggers. Credit limit minus credit floor is 100% of measured range. Credit floor does NOT enforce any limit on current balance.

Int.name: PIN_FLD_DYNAMIC_CREDIT_FLOOR
Int.Doc: Flags to indicate dynamic credit floor setting, whether to use credit_floor or sum of original balances for credit thresholds check

Int.name: PIN_FLD_OVERRIDE_CREDIT_LIMIT
Int.Doc: Flag to determine to either consider or not consider the credit limit. If flag is 0,(which is default), then credit limit will be decided based on rating modes. If the flag is 0x01, then credit limit will be overriden.

Int.name: PIN_FLD_CREDIT_THRESHOLDS
Int.Doc: Bit flags for triggering when resource balance crosses a boundary when increasing in value.

Int.name: PIN_FLD_LOAN_THRESHOLDS
Int.Doc: Bit flags for triggering when resource balance crosses a boundary when increasing in value.

Poid.name: PIN_FLD_BAL_GRP_OBJ
Poid.Doc: Balance Group poid: if passed, this balance group will be impacted otherwise, the one which belongs to the optional service_obj (if passed) or the account default one will be impacted.

Array.name: PIN_FLD_RULES
Array.Doc: This array contains the consumption rules to be applied on the resource.

Enum.name: PIN_FLD_CONSUMPTION_RULE
Enum.Doc: Consumption rule to be applied on the resource for determining the sub-balance to consume.

Substruct.name: PIN_FLD_CONTEXT_INFO
Substruct.Doc: Substruct to pass information from external clients.

String.name: PIN_FLD_CORRELATION_ID
String.Doc: Correlation id passed by an external system to BRM.

String.name: PIN_FLD_EXTERNAL_USER
String.Doc: User of an external system connecting to BRM.
